comics.maya: I don't know how to do this.
comics.caption: The solution to all of life's problems.

comics.maya: We should really meal prep this week.
comics.ro: You said that last week. And the week before.
comics.caption: The containers are still in the cabinet.

comics.maya: Have you tried turning the router off and on?
comics.caption: She had not tried that.

comics.maya: Just one more episode.
comics.ro: It's 1 AM. That's what you said at 10.
comics.caption: Episode 11 of 14.

comics.maya: I think I'm dying.
comics.caption: WebMD had a very different opinion.

comics.maya: I cleaned the whole apartment.
comics.ro: You moved the clutter to my room.
comics.caption: Technically not wrong.

comics.maya: I don't need a jacket. It's not that cold.
comics.caption: She wore the jacket.

comics.maya: The plant looks fine to me.
comics.ro: It's been dead for two weeks.
comics.caption: Neither of them watered it.

comics.maya: I'll be ready in five minutes.
comics.caption: Maya time. A parallel dimension.

comics.maya: I'm on a diet starting tomorrow.
comics.ro: You just finished a whole pizza.
comics.caption: The 'tomorrow' diet. Very popular.

comics.maya: I should probably check my bank account.
comics.ro: Last time you said that, you cried.
comics.caption: Ignorance is financial bliss.

comics.maya: I'm not lost. I know exactly where we are.
comics.ro: We've passed that same dog three times.
comics.caption: The dog was starting to recognize them.

comics.maya: I'll just have one cookie.
comics.ro: That's the entire pack of Oreos.
comics.caption: She meant one sleeve. Progress?

comics.maya: I can totally afford this.
comics.ro: Your card was just declined for coffee.
comics.caption: The math was not mathing.

comics.maya: Let's just take a quick nap.
comics.caption: The 'quick nap' that ends at 9 PM.

comics.maya: I'm going to return this tomorrow. I swear.
comics.caption: It's basically a family heirloom now.

comics.maya: Do you regret being my friend?
comics.caption: The most honest comic yet.

comics.maya: I think I'm going to start a podcast.
comics.ro: You don't even have a microphone.
comics.caption: The podcast that never was.

comics.maya: I should probably start going to the gym again.
comics.caption: The gym membership is still active, though.

comics.maya: I think I'm going to start a YouTube channel.
comics.ro: You don't even have a camera.
comics.caption: The YouTube channel that never was.
